label: Pericyte_1_non_inflamm
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) identify two pericyte populations in adult skin: Pericyte_1 (non-inflammatory) and Pericyte_2 (inflammatory). Literature on human skin pericytes (Ganier et al. 2024) identifies RGS5+ and TAGLN+ pericyte subpopulations. The non-inflammatory pericyte subtype (Pericyte_1) corresponds to the RGS5+ population with canonical perivascular identity and lower inflammatory gene expression. Pericytes are defined by co-expression of ACTA2, RGS5, and PDGFRB, distinguishing them from perivascular adventitial fibroblasts.
